## Summary
Describe the finance change clearly.

## Related issue
Link the related issue.

## Affected areas
List impacted finance areas, interfaces, controls, or documents.

## Control impact
Low / Medium / High / Critical

## Validation performed
Describe review and testing performed.

## Rollback approach
How can this be reversed?

## AI assistance
- [ ] Claude Code was used in preparing this change

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue exists
- [ ] Control impact assessed
- [ ] Documentation updated (or not required)
- [ ] Test evidence provided (if required)
